name: Model
description: Drawing surface and resource container.

name: Line
description: Line segment defined by two points.

name: Rectangle
description: Rectangular area defined by a location and size.

name: Rounded Rectangle
description: Rectangular area with rounded corners.

name: Ellipse
description: Elliptical area defined by a center and size.

name: Polyline
description: A connected series of line segments.

name: Polygon
description: Polygonal area defined by a series of line segments.

name: Path
description: Complex area defined by a series of drawing commands.

name: Quadratic Bezier Path
description: Demonstrates quadratic and smooth quadratic path commands.

name: Arc Path
description: Demonstrates the new arc primitive with configurable sweeps.

name: Star and Regular Polygon
description: Demonstrates regular polygons and star polygons from one primitive type.

name: Arrow
description: Demonstrates arrows with configurable head and shaft proportions.

name: Wedge / Sector
description: Demonstrates filled elliptical sectors with configurable start and end angles.

name: Ring / Annulus
description: Demonstrates annulus shapes with configurable inner radius scale.

name: Clip Paths
description: Demonstrates clipping rendered elements with custom path geometry.

name: Image
description: Bitmap image.

name: Text
description: Styled text element.

name: Rich Text
description: Demonstrates mixed typography within a single text element.

name: Text Decoration
description: Demonstrates text decoration and letter spacing on standard text elements.

name: Drop Shadow
description: Demonstrates element shadow rendering across multiple primitive types.

name: Blend Modes
description: Demonstrates canvas blend modes on overlapping elements.

name: Sprite
description: Series of bitmap image segments.

name: Embedded Model
description: Model contained in another model as an embedded resource.

name: Referenced Model
description: Model contained in another model as an externally referenced resource.

name: Colors
description: Colors used for stroking and filling elements.

name: Stroke Styles
description: Demonstrates dash patterns, line caps, and line joins.

name: Named Colors
description: Well known colors defined by name.

name: Transforms
description: Linear affine transformation for altering the visual appearance of elements.

name: Five Pointed Star
description: Generates a five pointed start polygon.

name: Model Grid
description: Demonstrates a grid of model elements.

name: SVG Import
description: Parses an inline SVG scene into Elise elements, including gradients, transforms, text, and clip paths.
